content: AI-Integrated Full -Stack Developer with a focus on building real-world AI applications . Delivered 8+ production -grade applications during a residency at ASPL, specializing in agentic AI systems and RAG pipelines using Gemini, Claude, and OpenAI. Advanced Python programmer with deep knowledge of AI/ML fundamentals. Decreased feature delivery cycles by 30% through AI-assisted engineering, focusing on scalable solutions that resolve complex business problems.

 Core Fundamentals: Python (Advanced Proficiency), NLP Concepts (Embeddings, Tokenization, Transformers), AI /ML Core Theory, Vector Search.  AI Frameworks & Tools: Gemini 2.0 Flash, Hugging Face, OpenAI SDK, Claude API, LangChain, RAG Architectures, Prompt Engineering.  Backend Engineering: Node.js, Python Flask, RESTful API Design, NextAuth.js, Playwright, Prisma ORM, SQLAlchemy.  Frontend Engineering : React.js, Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP.  Databases & Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Firebase, AWS (EC2, S3, IAM, VPC), Docker, Linux.  DevOps & Automation: Git/GitHub, Jenkins, CI/CD, n8n Automation, Jira, Agile/Scrum, CodeRabbit.

ASPL | Software Development Intern | Bengaluru | November 2025 – March 2026  Managed Client Delivery: Directed the end-to-end development of 8+ production projects, achieving 100% on-time handoffs and increasing development velocity by 30% via AI -assisted engineering.  Engineered RVTS (researchvisions.com): Built a Next.js 14 SaaS platform that improved client SEO performance by 45% through the inclusion of automated content generation pipelines.  Developed AIM Model (aimmodel.in): Architected a dark -themed portfolio featuring custom GSAP animations and DOM - driven sliders, resulting in a 20% improvement in UI responsiveness across mobile devices.  Orchestrated Cloud Dep loyments: Managed the deployment of 5+ enterprise sites on Hostinger Linux VPS using Nginx; merged n8n automation workflows to handle 500+ monthly lead captures autonomously.

UTL Technologies | Cloud Infrastructure Intern | Bengaluru | September 2024 – November 2024  Automated Infrastructure: Configured AWS environments (EC2, S3, VPC) for AI pipelines, utilizing Python shell scripts to eliminate 40% of manual deployment overhead.

Career -Ops: Autonomous AI Job Search Agent  Built End-to-End Automation: Developed a Gemini 2.0 Flash agent to scrape, evaluate, and rank 100+ job opportunities daily based on specific profile alignment.  Leveraged NLP & Web Scraping: Incorporated Playwright and NLP -driven scoring models to analyze Job Descriptions, filtering out 80% of low -match offers to prioritize high -quality applications.  Documen t Generation: Embedded a dynamic PDF engine to produce ATS -optimized resumes, resulting in a significant increase in recruiter response rates during testing. HRMS — AI-Enabled Management System  Optimized Workflows: Engineered a React and Flask -based system that digitized 100% of onboarding and attendance processes for a client with 4 departments.  Data Security & Analytics: Coupled PyJWT authentication with SQLAlchemy ORM to secure multi -table PostgreSQL

that digitized 100% of onboarding and attendance processes for a client with 4 departments.  Data Security & Analytics: Coupled PyJWT authentication with SQLAlchemy ORM to secure multi -table PostgreSQL queries, providing HR with real -time leave and p erformance insights. IoT Employee Attendance System — Face Recognition  Production Computer Vision: Deployed a Raspberry Pi system using OpenCV and Firebase for edge -based facial recognition, providing 99% accuracy in server -independent attendance tracking.

 Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) | CGPA: 8.5 | September 2023 – August 2025 Community Institute of Commerce & Management Studies, Bengaluru  Higher Secondary Education (Class XII) | CGPA: 5.3 | August 2021 – September 2023 Mother Theresa ECI School, Tamil Nadu CERTIFICATIONS & ACHIEVEMENTS  Cloud Security Fundamentals & Generative AI — Google Cloud | Certifi cate  AWS Cloud Practitioner — Certified, Amazon Web Services  IT Quiz Winner — CICMS College Fest  IT Manager Award — Excellence in Leadership, CICMS  Photography Award — Creative Arts Category, CICMS

 Client Management: Successfully translated requirements for 5+ external clients into technical deliverables with a 100% satisfaction rate.  Event Leadership: Organized 4 major tech fests, managing 100+ participants for Hackathons and Technical Charades.  Real -World AI Application: Deeply passionate about transforming theoretical AI models into production -ready products that impact end -users.
